synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-23087 Moderate: Oracle Linux 9 grafana security update
description:
[10.2.6-17]
- Resolves RHEL-125692: CVE-2025-58183
- Resolves RHEL-120426: Grafana-selinux prevents plugins from searching cgroups
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-23087

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-23087.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
grafana-10.2.6-17.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
grafana-selinux-10.2.6-17.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
grafana-10.2.6-17.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
grafana-selinux-10.2.6-17.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/grafana-10.2.6-17.el9_7.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-58183




Description of changes:

[10.2.6-17]
- Resolves RHEL-125692: CVE-2025-58183
- Resolves RHEL-120426: Grafana-selinux prevents plugins from searching cgroups
